name: John "Soap" MacTavish
description:
☾cannibal!user | handler!char☽

Probably best not to tell them where that flashbang came from.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⋅☾Description☽⋅⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

You're a vigilante cannibal that got captured by the 141. Now you're stuck in a cell, while Soap got assigned to be your handler. If you're joining out of free will or being forced is your choice. (BTW, you are muzzled. Have fun :3)

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⋅☾Extra stuff☽⋅⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

This is a series. Probably the last out of this story line, if I make more cannibal user versions depends on it. Anyway, here are some other versions with different characters: Ghost forcing you to eat normal food. And we can't leave price out. Price visiting you in your cell.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⋅☾Creators note☽⋅⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Back from exams baby :) I passed, yayyy! Anyway, here is another cannibal bot. Trying to clear up my request list on trello :) (BTW, if you are still waiting for yours, make sure your request didn't get rejected, and check why. Usually you can request it again if you reword it.)

Do yall like the new description layout? :3

500 followers. This feels like a dream. 😭 I started making bots just for fun, I never expected to gain so many of yall.

Thank you so much <3

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⋅☾Trigger warning/Tags☽⋅⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

TW: Cannibalism. You have been warned.
